articles.title: Historic Somerville Theatre and Capitol Theatre buildings hit the market
articles.description:
The buildings that house the Somerville Theatre and Capitol Theatre are each listed with an asking price of $12 million.

The post Historic Somerville Theatre and Capitol Theatre buildings hit the market appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Somerville Theatre and Capitol Theatre buildings listed for sale at $12 million each.
Historic venues may face redevelopment or change in ownership affecting local culture.
Potential buyers could influence entertainment options for Somerville and surrounding Boston residents.

articles.title: Matt Turner’s loan with the Revolution extended; New England has option to buy GK from Lyon
articles.description:
Turner's contract status means he's no longer a Designated Player. Could this signal a major midseason addition from New England?

The post Matt Turner’s loan with the Revolution extended; New England has option to buy GK from Lyon appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New England Revolution extends Matt Turner's loan from Lyon, enhancing team depth.
Turner's contract adjustment removes him as a Designated Player, opening roster flexibility.
Revolution's option to buy Turner could lead to significant midseason roster changes.

articles.title: Trooper injured in wrong-way crash on Mass. Pike in Chicopee
articles.description:
Police say the wrong-way driver is facing charges of drunken driving and negligent operation.

The post Trooper injured in wrong-way crash on Mass. Pike in Chicopee appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trooper injured in a wrong-way crash on Mass. Pike in Chicopee.
Driver faces charges for drunken driving and negligent operation.
Incident raises concerns about road safety for Boston commuters.

articles.title: Here’s how hot and humid it could get this week, according to Boston meteorologists
articles.description:
"Little relief overnight."

The post Here’s how hot and humid it could get this week, according to Boston meteorologists appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston faces a week of high heat and humidity, starting July 13.
Temperatures could reach the mid-90s with high humidity levels.
Residents should prepare for uncomfortable conditions and potential health risks.

articles.title: Fatal shooting in Biddeford, Maine, involved ICE, state House speaker says
articles.description:
House Speaker Ryan Fecteau wrote on Facebook that the shooting occurred Monday morning.

The post Fatal shooting in Biddeford, Maine, involved ICE, state House speaker says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Fatal shooting occurred Monday morning in Biddeford, Maine, involving ICE agents.
House Speaker Ryan Fecteau confirmed the incident on Facebook.
The shooting raises concerns about ICE's presence and safety in nearby communities.

articles.title: Man who killed Dartmouth professors at 17 to get a chance at parole in about 20 years, judge rules
articles.description:
Lawyers for Robert Tulloch, now 43, and the prosecution reached an agreement on the terms, avoiding a three-day planned resentencing hearing.

The post Man who killed Dartmouth professors at 17 to get a chance at parole in about 20 years, judge rules appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Robert Tulloch, now 43, will be eligible for parole in 20 years.
Tulloch was convicted for the 2001 murders of Dartmouth professors.
The agreement avoids a lengthy resentencing hearing, impacting local legal proceedings.

articles.title: Red Sox used a 9th round pick in MLB Draft on an intriguing power-hitting prospect
articles.description:
"He’s an incredible athlete that has a chance to stick in center field and his performance speaks for itself not only in the summer circuit last year, but also what he did in his high school season."

The post Red Sox used a 9th round pick in MLB Draft on an intriguing power-hitting prospect appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox selected power-hitting prospect Martin Shelar in the 9th round of the MLB Draft.
Shelar showcased impressive athleticism and performance during his high school season and summer circuit.
His potential to play center field may enhance the Red Sox's future roster options.

articles.title: A woman had to be rescued from a N.H. mountain. Then her boyfriend proposed.
articles.description:
It was an eventful Saturday for 29-year-old Alexis Hardy.

The post A woman had to be rescued from a N.H. mountain. Then her boyfriend proposed. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Alexis Hardy, 29, was rescued from a New Hampshire mountain on Saturday.
Her boyfriend proposed immediately after her rescue, marking a memorable moment.
The incident highlights the importance of safety in outdoor activities for Boston residents.
